name: Banana Slush Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen Orange juice concentrate, 12 oz.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the bananas thoroughly and add slightly thawed frozen juices to a blender.
2. Add sugar and pineapple juice to a large pitcher and stir until dissolved.
3. Mix the two batches together and pour into a clean one-gallon container or pitcher.
4. Fill with water (or milk) and freeze until solid, about 1 inch from the top.
5. When ready to serve, cut off the plastic bottle from the frozen base.
6. Pour chilled lemon-lime soda over the slush mixture. Enjoy!
Punch base can be frozen and kept indefinitely.
